name: Bluff Country Bus-Plainview
fmcsa_status: active (USDOT active; not authorized for-hire interstate, NA for school bus/private)
inc_date: unknown (operating since Aug 1995 when Doug & Cara Grisim purchased from Tiedemann; a related entity 'Bluff Country School Bus Service of Plainview-Elgin-Millville' registered in MN 2013-07-30)
officers: Douglas (Doug) Grisim - President; Cara Grisim - Owner
registry_source: Minnesota Secretary of State (corporate registry not directly verified online); company website + SAFER
notes: Legal name in FMCSA is BLUFF COUNTRY SCHOOL BUS SERVICE INC; HQ is Lake City, MN with operations in Plainview, Wabasha-Kellogg, and Lake City school districts. Plainview location is a satellite/operations site at 500 10th St SW. Acquired by PEM Transportation in July 2024 per public sources; the legal entity name remains in SAFER. 50+ buses per company website; SAFER MCS-150 lists 39 power units / 63 drivers.

name: R & R Big Bus
notes: No matching FMCSA/SAFER record found under 'R & R Big Bus' or close variants in Texas. Closest TX match is R&R Limousine and Bus (USDOT 2081925) in Austin TX, but that is a limo/charter company and name does not include 'Big Bus' - not a confident match. Texas SOS records for 'R & R Big Bus' were not located via web search. Entity may be a small intrastate/private operator without USDOT, or may operate under a different legal name. Input record had no HQ/address, limiting matching.

notes: West Bus Service Inc, Carbondale IL - school bus operator since 1961, incorporated 7/10/1972. USDOT 78327 now shows INACTIVE in SAFER; last compliance review August 2008. Fleet of ~50 owned units, ~50 drivers per most recent MCS-150 on record. Address 700 New Era Rd Carbondale IL matches input record. BBB listing indicates the business is no longer in operation.

notes: No FMCSA/SAFER record found for 'All American Bus' or 'All American Bus Company' located in Hawthorne NJ. Keyword search returned only entities in VA, TN, and unrelated locations. Multiple business directories list All American Bus Company Inc at PO Box 406, Hawthorne NJ 07507 as a charter bus service with William Lees as owner, but no DOT registration was traceable. notes: E-FFICIENT SCHOOL TRANSPORTATION LLC, USDOT 2387124. Physical address is 8302 Hwy 65 NE, Spring Lake Park MN 55432 - close to but not the same as input address (422 84th Ln NW, Coon Rapids, MN 55433). Spring Lake Park borders Coon Rapids, so likely the same business with HQ across municipal boundary. Operates intrastate; school transportation focus. 1 inspection past 24 months, no crashes.
